narrative:
Cols 82-I (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 59.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
